task_tokens_consumed: Does any 2024-2026 paper propose a category-theoretic natural-transformation check between two LLMs across a structured prompt corpus as a model-equivalence verdict?

hypothesized_clusters.cluster_description: Topos-theoretic frameworks for generative AI/LLM architectures using sheaves, functors, Yoneda for design.
Methods for testing whether two LLMs produce equivalent outputs on benchmark corpora.
Tests that LLMs give consistent answers across paraphrased prompts.
Methods to detect drift between teacher and distilled student LLM.

landscape_completeness_claim: Four clusters cover the main axes (categorical architecture, behavioral equivalence, paraphrase consistency, distillation drift) intersecting with this candidate's claim.
